headline: Journalist Safety Incidents Reach 28 Including Assaults
context: NUJ Malaysia documented 28 safety incidents affecting journalists in 2025 including physical assaults threats and surveillance.

cards.big: 28 journalist safety incidents in 2025 including 8 physical assaults
cards.sub: Reporters covering corruption protests and environment face increasing danger

cards.big: 8 assault cases resulted in only 2 arrests and no convictions
cards.sub: Photojournalists covering protests were primary targets of violence

cards.big: 12 journalists received credible death threats related to investigations
cards.sub: Police opened files on all 12 but only 3 progressed to suspect ID

cards.big: 4 journalists discovered surveillance software on their devices
cards.sub: Forensic analysis traced 2 instances to government agency capabilities

cards.big: Journalist safety tests whether press freedom includes physical protection for reporters
28 journalist safety incidents including assaults. Press safety requires investigation, not just condemnation.
